title: Cinemas
metaDescription: Digital and film cinema equipment, design, and installation for movie theaters, from single screens to multiplexes.
dek: Projection, sound, and seating systems for movie theaters of any size.
body: Magna-Tech supplies and installs digital (DCP) and analog (16/35/70mm) cinema projection and sound systems, and maintains an inventory of equipment available for short- and medium-term rental — useful for events, festivals, and temporary screens as well as permanent installations.
For new builds and renovations, MTE works from theatrical design through sourcing, logistics, and installation, so an operator can open on schedule and on budget.
imageAlt: Cinema auditorium with digital projection and sound system

title: Outdoor & Drive-In Cinemas
metaDescription: Equipment and design for drive-in theaters, pop-up screens, and outdoor cinema events.
dek: Projection and sound systems built for open-air and drive-in screenings.
body: Outdoor screenings pair well with other on-site activity — festivals, markets, and concession sales — and can be set up in almost any open space: a lot next to an existing business, a park, or a purpose-built drive-in.

A typical outdoor system combines a projector-and-screen pair (or an LED screen), a DCI-compliant media server or standard media player, a sound processor, and accessible controls. Magna-Tech specs and supplies each component and can advise on site layout, power, and accessibility for guests.

title: Cruise Ships
metaDescription: Cinema and AV equipment sized and specified for shipboard installation.
dek: Cinema and entertainment AV systems built for the marine environment.
body: Shipboard cinemas and entertainment spaces have constraints landside venues don't: space, weight, power, and vibration. MTE specifies projection, sound, and display equipment suited to marine installation and coordinates with a vessel's build or refit schedule.

title: Educational Facilities
metaDescription: AV, projection, and planetarium equipment for schools, colleges, and universities.
dek: Classroom, auditorium, and planetarium systems for schools and universities.
body: From lecture-hall projection to full planetarium domes, Magna-Tech has supplied AV and projection systems to university auditoriums, student union theaters, and planetariums at colleges and high schools across the US.

title: Government & Military
metaDescription: Briefing room and auditorium AV systems for government and military facilities.
dek: Briefing rooms, auditoriums, and training facilities for government and military clients.
body: MTE has supplied briefing-room and auditorium AV systems to U.S. military and government facilities, including installations for the armed services and federal agencies. Procurement requirements for this sector can differ from commercial work — contact us to discuss your agency's specifications.

title: Houses of Worship
metaDescription: Sound, video, and presentation systems for churches, synagogues, and other worship spaces.
dek: Sound and video systems for congregations of any size.
body: MTE designs sound reinforcement and video/presentation systems for congregations, sized to the room and the service — from a single sanctuary sound system to multi-room AV with overflow video.

title: Planetariums
metaDescription: Digital planetarium projection systems for museums, science centers, and universities.
dek: Full-dome digital projection systems for museums, science centers, and universities.
body: Magna-Tech has supplied and installed digital planetarium systems — including Konica Minolta MediaGlobe projectors and full-dome surround sound — at science museums and university planetariums across the United States, from initial dome design through commissioning.
imageAlt: Planetarium dome interior with digital projection

title: Performing Arts Theaters
metaDescription: Projection, sound, and stage AV systems for performing arts theaters and cultural centers.
dek: Projection, sound, and stage systems for live-performance venues.
body: MTE has equipped historic and modern performing-arts theaters with projection, seating, and sound systems, including work at the Colony Theatre and Olympia Theater (Gusman Cultural Center) in Miami.

title: Museums
metaDescription: AV, projection, and planetarium systems for museums and science centers.
dek: Auditorium, exhibit, and planetarium AV systems for museums.
body: From auditorium projection to dedicated planetarium domes, MTE has worked with museums and science centers including the American Museum of Natural History and the Morikami Museum on exhibit and auditorium AV systems.
